data.title: 国际服活动常驻化「Head Prefect Hina's Summer Break!」
data.summary: [Immortalized Event Notice] The Event Story, Head Prefect Hina's Summer Break!, has been immortalize
data.body:
[Immortalized Event Notice]

The Event Story, Head Prefect Hina's Summer Break!, has been immortalized today, so you can play it anytime!

Log in now to check it out, Sensei!
